pokemon:clauncher.name: Clauncher
pokemon:clauncher.summary: Through controlled explosions of internal gas, it can expel water like a pistol shot. At close distances, it can shatter rock.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Through controlled explosions of internal gas, it can expel water like a pistol shot. At close distances, it can shatter rock.
They knock down flying prey by firing compressed water from their massive claws like shooting a pistol.
By detonating gas that accumulates in its right claw, this Pokémon launches water like a bullet. This is how Clauncher defeats its enemies.
Clauncher’s claws can fall off during battle, but they’ll regenerate. The meat inside the claws is popular as a delicacy in Galar.
It moves around by jetting water from its right pincer. It has a poor sense of balance, so it’s terrible at swimming straight.
Its claws occasionally fall off, and it keeps a low profile until they grow back. The meat of its claws is so delicious!
They knock down flying prey by firing compressed water from their massive claws like shooting a pistol.
Through controlled explosions of internal gas, it can expel water like a pistol shot. At close distances, it can shatter rock.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: Through controlled explosions of internal gas, it can expel water like a pistol shot. At close distances, it can shatter rock.

pokemon:clawitzer.name: Clawitzer
pokemon:clawitzer.summary: By expelling water from the nozzle in the back of its claw, it can move at a speed of 60 knots.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: By expelling water from the nozzle in the back of its claw, it can move at a speed of 60 knots.
Their enormous claws launch cannonballs of water powerful enough to pierce tanker hulls.
Clawitzer’s right arm is a cannon that launches projectiles made of seawater. Shots from a Clawitzer’s cannon arm can sink a tanker.
After using the feelers on its oversized claw to detect the location of prey, Clawitzer launches a cannonball of water at its target.
Its right arm is packed with meat. When its pincer falls off, it’s exported to be used as a cooking ingredient.
It compresses the water it has sucked up and then projects it with enough power to punch a hole right through a thick sheet of iron.
Their enormous claws launch cannonballs of water powerful enough to pierce tanker hulls.
By expelling water from the nozzle in the back of its claw, it can move at a speed of 60 knots.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: By expelling water from the nozzle in the back of its claw, it can move at a speed of 60 knots.
